channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Costco workers authorize nationwide strike
item.description: Thousands of Costco workers nationwide voted Sunday to authorize a strike if a contract is not reached by the end of the month.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KREX 5

item.title: Trump, in his inaugural address, rips into the country's past leaders and makes sweeping promises
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President Donald Trump’s second inaugural address sounded a lot like his first, with a sweeping indictment of the country he inherits and grand promises to fix its problems. Eight years ago, Trump described “American carnage” and promised to end it immediately.
item.dc:creator: STEVE PEOPLES, NICHOLAS RICCARDI and BILL BARROW, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Melania Trump hat: What people had to say about Inauguration Day fashion
item.description: Of all the things that people could be talking about on Inauguration Day, it didn't take long for people to latch onto the attire of Melania Trump, with one point of discussion taking the lead: her hat.
item.dc:creator: Brian Farrell, Fox 5

item.title: Former Planned Parenthood president, women's rights activist Cecile Richards has died at 67
item.description: Cecile Richards, a national leader for women’s rights who led Planned Parenthood for 12 tumultuous years, has died.
item.dc:creator: Holly Ramer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Biden commutes sentence of Native American activist Leonard Peltier
item.description: President Joe Biden on Monday commuted the life sentence of activist Leonard Peltier, who was controversially convicted of murdering two FBI agents, within the final hour of his presidency.
item.dc:creator: Zack Budryk, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump to issue executive orders defining sexes, ending DEI practices in government
item.description: President-elect Trump intends to issue executive orders on his first day in office that will recognize only two sexes, male and female, and aim to end diversity, equity and inclusion (DEI) practices in the federal government, according to incoming White House officials.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Texas lawmakers push for decriminalization of fentanyl test strips
item.description: One Texas lawmaker is advocating for the decriminalization of fentanyl test strips as part of the solution.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Peck, NewsNation

item.title: WATCH LIVE: Trump supporters celebrate inauguration at Capitol One Arena
item.description: On a frigid holiday Monday in Washington, D.C., Donald Trump took the oath of office for a second time to become the 47th president of the United States.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, Fox 5

item.title: Bills will face Chiefs in AFC title game; Eagles will host the Commanders in NFC championship game
item.description: Josh Allen and the Buffalo Bills will take on Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs in the AFC championship game for their fourth playoff matchup in five years. Allen ran for two touchdowns and the Bills beat Lamar Jackson and the Baltimore Ravens 27-25 in a divisional game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump to promise 'new era of national success' in inaugural address
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump is set to promise a “new era of national success” in his inaugural address, according to The Wall Street Journal.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: Biden pardons Fauci, Jan. 6 committee ahead of Trump inauguration
item.description: (The Hill) -- President Joe Biden granted pardons to several prominent public servants Monday who have faced attacks from President-elect Donald Trump in one of his final acts in office. Biden issued pardons for Dr.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, KRON4

item.title: Georgia man accused of stabbing off-duty Atlanta police officer after hit-and-run remains on the loose
item.description: Authorities are searching for a Georgia man accused of stabbing an off-duty Atlanta police officer during a confrontation after a hit-and-run over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: TikTok restores service for US users based on Trump's promised executive order
item.description: TikTok restored service to users in the United States on Sunday just hours after the popular video-sharing platform went dark in response to a federal ban, which President-elect Donald Trump said he would try to pause by executive order on his first day in office.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: 5 takeaways from Trump's inauguration eve rally
item.description: President-elect Trump on Sunday rallied with supporters in Washington, D.C., on the eve of his second inauguration, taking a victory lap and teasing an expected barrage of activity on his first day in office. Here are five takeaways from Trump’s rally at Capital One Arena.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: The rise
item.description: The possibility of the U.S. outlawing TikTok kept influencers and users in anxious limbo during the four-plus years that lawmakers and judges debated the fate of the video-sharing platform. The moment its fans dreaded arrived late Saturday when the platform went dark in response to a federal ban.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Heavy snow and frigid Arctic blast put 70 million across the US under winter storm warnings
item.description: Tens of millions of residents along the East Coast are bracing for several inches of snow Sunday followed by dangerously cold temperatures that will grip much of the country from the Northern Plains to the tip of Maine.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump returns to Washington for celebrations ahead of inauguration
item.description: Donald Trump returned to Washington Saturday evening to celebrate with family, supporters and political allies ahead of his second inauguration.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: These lip balm ingredients may be making your chapped lips worse, experts say
item.description: It's tempting to reach for lip balm during the dry, winter months, but it may not be helping you at all.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: Gaza ceasefire takes hold and the first handover of hostages is underway
item.description: A ceasefire between Israel and Hamas took hold in the Gaza Strip on Sunday, ushering in an initial six-week period of calm and raising hopes for the release of dozens of militant-held hostages and an end to the devastating 15-month war.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Why are lone homes left standing after the fires? It's not entirely luck
item.description: Emails and videos of burned buildings in Los Angeles next to those left standing have been flying back and forth among architects, builders and fire safety specialists around the world.
item.dc:creator: ED DAVEY and INGRID LOBET, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: TikTok goes dark as US ban takes effect
item.description: Millions of TikTok users in the United States are no longer able to watch videos on the social media platform as a federal ban on the immensely popular app takes effect.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Stephen Curry considered day to day after injuring left ankle in win over Wizards
item.description: Stephen Curry injured his left ankle in the final minutes of the Golden State Warriors victory over Washington on Saturday night and is considered day to day.
item.dc:creator: ERIC HE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Missouri lawmakers are going after voter-approved abortion rights. Voters will likely reelect them
item.description: JEFFERSON CITY, Mo. (AP) — Voters in Missouri last election approved a constitutional amendment that promised to undo the state's near-total abortion ban.
item.dc:creator: SUMMER BALLENTINE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Most voters in new survey seek toned-down Trump agenda
item.description: Over 60% of Americans polled disagree with Trump's idea to replace thousands of career civil-service workers.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, ABC 4

item.title: ESPN college basketball analyst Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting delayed by accident at home
item.description: Dick Vitale's return to broadcasting following cancer treatments will be delayed after the ESPN college basketball analyst had an accident at his Florida home. Vitale announced Saturday he will not be on the call for next Saturday's game between No.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Washington retires its first women's jersey, sending Kelsey Plum's No. 10 to the rafters
item.description: It was always a matter of when — not if — Washington would retire Kelsey Plum’s number. Eight years after she graduated, it happened.
item.dc:creator: JOSH KIRSHENBAUM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: WATCH: Stray dog brings sick, freezing puppy to vet's office
item.description: A stray dog was caught on camera carrying her sick puppy to the front door of a veterinarian clinic in Turkey earlier this week.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, ABC 4

item.title: Live updates: Trump inauguration weekend commences as protesters rally in Washington
item.description: Inauguration festivities will begin in full force Saturday as President-elect Trump and his allies — and protesters — arrive in Washington ahead of Monday's inauguration of the 47th president of the U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Where to turn when a natural disaster upends your finances
item.description: Here’s how you can get help and be strategic with your resources as you begin to rebuild after a disaster.
item.dc:creator: Laura McMullen, Fox 5

item.title: Texas police officer, an Army veteran, killed in line of duty during car chase
item.description: A Texas community is mourning the loss of Navasota Police Sgt. Mark Butler, who died while saving others from a wrong-way driver during a pursuit.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: College students accused of online 'catch a predator' plot appear in court
item.description: Six Assumption University students were in court to face charges in a connection made between a Holyoke woman and a man on Tinder, which resulted in a TikTok plot to confront a falsely accused sexual predator.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Shook, WGN 9

item.title: Wisdom of a California grandmother, 90, goes viral amid Eaton Fire tragedy
item.description: A nearly 90-year-old California woman who lost her home to the Eaton Fire is going viral for pragmatism and positivity in the face of so much adversity.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, WGN 9

item.title: New Jersey teacher charged with allegedly sexually assaulting former student, having his child
item.description: A New Jersey teacher is facing charges after police say she is accused of sexually abusing one of her students and having his child.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Cristelli, WGN 9

item.title: Bail denied for American captured in France and accused of assaulting Pennsylvania student
item.description: EAST BERLIN, Pa. (AP) — An American accused of sexually assaulting a college student in 2013 and later sending her a Facebook message that said “So I raped you” was ordered held without bail Friday during a court hearing in Pennsylvania.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Bruce Willis shakes hands with first responders in rare public appearance
item.description: Amid the devastating wildfires in Southern California, Bruce Willis took time to thank first responders.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Supreme Court upholds TikTok ban
item.description: The Supreme Court on Friday unanimously upheld a law requiring TikTok’s China-based parent company to divest from the app, teeing up a ban set to take effect Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, WGN 9

item.title: What to know about RedNote, a TikTok alternative
item.description: TikTok patrons are turning to a new platform in light of the nationwide ban set to shut down the app on Sunday. RedNote, a Chinese short-form video platform, is gaining ground as users look for an alternative to the social media company owned by the China's ByteDance.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, Fox 5
